text.ro: Aveti un inventar complet al tuturor echipamentelor IT?
text.en: Do you have a complete inventory of all IT equipment?

recommendation.ro: Implementati solutie automatizata de descoperire (Intune, Lansweeper, CMDB)
recommendation.en: Implement automated discovery solution (Intune, Lansweeper, CMDB)

text.ro: Aveti inventar complet al echipamentelor OT (SCADA, PLC, ICS)?
text.en: Do you have complete inventory of OT equipment (SCADA, PLC, ICS)?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati solutie pasiva OT (Claroty, Nozomi, Dragos etc)
recommendation.en: Use passive OT asset discovery (Claroty, Nozomi, Dragos etc)

text.ro: Sunt asset-urile clasificate in functie de criticitate?
text.en: Are assets classified based on criticality?

recommendation.ro: Definiti matrice de clasificare (confidential/critic/operational)

text.ro: Exista un responsabil clar pentru managementul asset-urilor?
text.en: Is there a clearly defined responsible person for asset management?

recommendation.ro: Atribuiti asset owner pentru fiecare categorie majora
recommendation.en: Assign asset owner for each major category

text.ro: Cum actualizati inventarul (automat/manual)?
text.en: How is the inventory updated (automatic/manual)?

recommendation.ro: Treceti la actualizare automata zilnica/saptamanala

text.ro: Este inventarul verificat periodic (ex: trimestrial)?
text.en: Is inventory periodically verified (e.g. quarterly)?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti reconciliere fizica anuala/semestriala

text.ro: Aveti lista cu software autorizat si neautorizat?
text.en: Do you have list of authorized and unauthorized software?

recommendation.ro: Implementati whitelisting / application control

text.ro: Exista control asupra dispozitivelor mobile / endpoint-uri personale?
text.en: Is there control over mobile devices / personal endpoints (BYOD)?

recommendation.ro: Implementati MDM/MAM + politica BYOD clara

text.ro: Sunt evidentiate sistemele critice pentru continuitatea afacerii?
text.en: Are business continuity critical systems clearly identified?

recommendation.ro: Marcati sistemele BIA ca critice in inventar
recommendation.en: Tag BIA critical systems in inventory

text.ro: Aveti procedura de decommissioning a echipamentelor vechi?
text.en: Do you have decommissioning procedure for old equipment?

recommendation.ro: Definiti procedura de stergere criptografica / distrugere fizica
recommendation.en: Define cryptographic wipe / physical destruction procedure

text.ro: Folositi Active Directory sau Azure AD pentru gestionarea userilor?
text.en: Do you use Active Directory or Azure AD for user management?

recommendation.ro: Migrati spre Azure AD/Entra ID ca sursa principala
recommendation.en: Migrate to Azure AD/Entra ID as primary identity source

text.ro: Este MFA obligatoriu pentru toti utilizatorii?
text.en: Is MFA mandatory for all users?

recommendation.ro: Activati MFA fara exceptii (Conditional Access + Security Defaults)
recommendation.en: Enforce MFA without exceptions (Conditional Access + Security Defaults)

text.ro: Exista conturi privilegiate si cum sunt controlate?
text.en: Do privileged accounts exist and how are they controlled?

recommendation.ro: Implementati Azure PIM sau solutie PAM dedicata
recommendation.en: Implement Azure PIM or dedicated PAM solution

text.ro: Revizuiti accesul periodic? Cat de des?
text.en: Do you review access periodically? How often?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti revizuire trimestriala cu raportare

text.ro: Cum se gestioneaza conturile inactive?
text.en: How are inactive accounts managed?

recommendation.ro: Dezactivati automat conturile inactive >90 zile

text.ro: Sunt aplicatiile cloud integrate cu sistemul de autentificare central?
text.en: Are cloud applications integrated with central authentication?

recommendation.ro: Implementati SSO (SAML/OIDC) pentru toate aplicatiile cloud
recommendation.en: Implement SSO (SAML/OIDC) for all cloud apps

text.ro: Exista politici pentru parole si autentificare?
text.en: Do password and authentication policies exist?

recommendation.ro: Treceti la passphrases + protectie impotriva spraying

text.ro: Este implementata segregarea rolurilor (RBAC)?
text.en: Is role segregation (RBAC) implemented?

recommendation.ro: Definiti si aplicati roluri least-privilege

text.ro: Cine aproba accesul la resurse critice?
text.en: Who approves access to critical resources?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti flux de aprobare multi-level pentru acces critic
recommendation.en: Introduce multi-level approval for critical access

text.ro: Exista monitorizare a activitatii conturilor privilegiate?
text.en: Is privileged account activity monitored?

recommendation.ro: Activati logging si alerting pentru conturi privilegiate
recommendation.en: Enable logging and alerting for privileged accounts

text.ro: Toti angajatii fac training anual de securitate?
text.en: Do all employees complete annual security training?

recommendation.ro: Implementati training anual obligatoriu cu tracking
recommendation.en: Implement mandatory annual training with tracking

text.ro: Este obligatoriu pentru noi angajati?
text.en: Is it mandatory for new hires?

recommendation.ro: Includeti modul de securitate in onboarding (primele 30 zile)
recommendation.en: Include security module in onboarding (first 30 days)

text.ro: Se fac simulari phishing si social engineering?
text.en: Are phishing and social engineering simulations performed?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti simulari trimestriale + raportare rezultate

text.ro: Se urmareste rezultatul simularilor?
text.en: Are simulation results tracked?

recommendation.ro: Definiti KPI-uri (click rate, report rate) si trend
recommendation.en: Define KPIs (click rate, report rate) and trend

text.ro: Exista plan de refresh pentru cunostintele de securitate?
text.en: Is there a knowledge refresh plan?

recommendation.ro: Trimiteti micro-training lunar / newsletter securitate

text.ro: Angajatii stiu cui sa raporteze incidente?
text.en: Do employees know who to report incidents to?

recommendation.ro: Afisati clar canalul de raportare (email/telefon/portal)

text.ro: Sunt promovate politici si reguli interne de securitate?
text.en: Are internal security policies and rules promoted?

recommendation.ro: Includeti politici in intranet + campanie anuala
recommendation.en: Include policies in intranet + annual campaign

text.ro: Se masoara impactul programului de awareness?
text.en: Is the impact of the awareness program measured?

recommendation.ro: Definiti metrici (phishing click rate, incidente raportate etc)
recommendation.en: Define metrics (phishing click rate, reported incidents etc)

text.ro: Ce metode de instruire se folosesc (online, workshop, email, etc.)?
text.en: What training methods are used (online, workshop, email, etc.)?

recommendation.ro: Combinati e-learning + workshop live + simulari

text.ro: Exista instruire specifica pentru grupuri cu acces privilegiat?
text.en: Is there targeted training for privileged users?

recommendation.ro: Realizati sesiuni dedicate pentru admini si dezvoltatori
recommendation.en: Conduct dedicated sessions for admins and developers

text.ro: Toate device-urile au antivirus / EDR instalat?
text.en: Do all devices have antivirus / EDR installed?

recommendation.ro: Implementati EDR (Defender for Endpoint, CrowdStrike etc)
recommendation.en: Deploy EDR (Defender for Endpoint, CrowdStrike etc)

text.ro: Este protectia actualizata constant?
text.en: Is protection constantly updated?

recommendation.ro: Activati actualizari automate si monitorizare conformitate
recommendation.en: Enable automatic updates and compliance monitoring

text.ro: Exista monitorizare centrala a endpoint-urilor?
text.en: Is there central endpoint monitoring?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati SIEM / XDR cu agent pe toate endpoint-urile
recommendation.en: Use SIEM / XDR with agents on all endpoints

text.ro: Este patching-ul automat pentru sistemele critice?
text.en: Is patching automated for critical systems?

recommendation.ro: Implementati WSUS / Intune / patch management centralizat
recommendation.en: Implement WSUS / Intune / centralized patch management

text.ro: Se gestioneaza device-urile mobile?
text.en: Are mobile devices managed?

recommendation.ro: Implementati MDM pentru toate telefoane/tablete corporative
recommendation.en: Implement MDM for all corporate phones/tablets

text.ro: Exista criptare pentru laptopuri si device-uri mobile?
text.en: Is there encryption for laptops and mobile devices?

recommendation.ro: Activati BitLocker / FileVault + recuperare chei centralizata
recommendation.en: Enable BitLocker / FileVault + centralized key recovery

text.ro: Se fac verificari de conformitate pentru software neautorizat?
text.en: Are checks performed for unauthorized software?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati tool de software inventory + alerting

text.ro: Cum se gestioneaza incidentele la nivel endpoint?
text.en: How are endpoint-level incidents managed?

recommendation.ro: Definiti proces de izolare / investigare endpoint

text.ro: Sunt log-urile endpoint-urilor colectate central?
text.en: Are endpoint logs collected centrally?

recommendation.ro: Trimiteti log-uri catre SIEM / central logger
recommendation.en: Forward endpoint logs to SIEM / central logger

text.ro: Exista procedura de reactie la malware?
text.en: Is there a malware response procedure?

recommendation.ro: Actualizati procedura cu flux EDR containment
recommendation.en: Update procedure with EDR containment flow

text.ro: Exista firewall-uri si sunt configurate corect?
text.en: Do firewalls exist and are they properly configured?

recommendation.ro: Revizuiti si intariti regulile firewall (least privilege)
recommendation.en: Review and harden firewall rules (least privilege)

text.ro: Exista segmentare intre retelele IT si OT?
text.en: Is there segmentation between IT and OT networks?

recommendation.ro: Implementati Purdue Model / DMZ intre IT si OT
recommendation.en: Implement Purdue Model / DMZ between IT and OT

text.ro: Este VPN-ul securizat pentru acces remote?
text.en: Is VPN secured for remote access?

recommendation.ro: Integrati VPN cu MFA + Conditional Access
recommendation.en: Integrate VPN with MFA + Conditional Access

text.ro: Exista monitorizare a traficului retelei?
text.en: Is network traffic monitored?

recommendation.ro: Implementati NDR / NetFlow catre SIEM

text.ro: Exista IDS/IPS activ?
text.en: Is IDS/IPS active?

recommendation.ro: Activati IPS inline pe puncte critice
recommendation.en: Enable inline IPS on critical points

text.ro: Cum se gestioneaza accesul din exterior?
text.en: How is external access managed?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati bastion host / Zero Trust pentru acces extern
recommendation.en: Use bastion host / Zero Trust for external access

text.ro: Exista politici de securitate pentru Wi-Fi?
text.en: Are there Wi-Fi security policies?

recommendation.ro: WPA3 + certificat + segmentare guest

text.ro: Se fac teste periodice de penetrare pe retea?
text.en: Are periodic network penetration tests performed?

recommendation.ro: Planificati pentest anual + retest dupa remediere
recommendation.en: Schedule annual pentest + retest after remediation

text.ro: Exista control asupra accesului fizic la echipamente de retea?
text.en: Is there control over physical access to network equipment?

recommendation.ro: Acces restrans + logging camere / badge

text.ro: Sunt configurate reguli de securitate pentru acces la servicii cloud?
text.en: Are security rules configured for cloud service access?

recommendation.ro: Implementati network security groups / firewall cloud

text.ro: Cum este gestionat accesul la Azure (RBAC)?
text.en: How is access to Azure managed (RBAC)?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati least privilege + PIM pentru roluri Azure
recommendation.en: Apply least privilege + PIM for Azure roles

text.ro: Exista Conditional Access activ?
text.en: Is Conditional Access active?

recommendation.ro: Creati politici Conditional Access pentru Azure si M365
recommendation.en: Create Conditional Access policies for Azure and M365

text.ro: Logging-ul este activ pentru toate resursele?
text.en: Is logging active for all resources?

recommendation.ro: Activati Azure Monitor + Log Analytics pentru toate resursele
recommendation.en: Enable Azure Monitor + Log Analytics for all resources

text.ro: Folositi Microsoft Defender for Cloud sau alt tool similar?
text.en: Do you use Microsoft Defender for Cloud or similar?

recommendation.ro: Activati Defender for Cloud la nivel Standard
recommendation.en: Enable Defender for Cloud at Standard tier

text.ro: Exista proceduri de backup in cloud?
text.en: Are there cloud backup procedures?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati Azure Backup + imutabilitate

text.ro: Sunt activate alertele de securitate?
text.en: Are security alerts enabled?

recommendation.ro: Configurati Azure Sentinel sau Microsoft Defender XDR
recommendation.en: Configure Azure Sentinel or Microsoft Defender XDR

text.ro: Cum sunt protejate datele sensibile in cloud?
text.en: How are sensitive data protected in cloud?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati encryption + sensitivity labels

text.ro: Cum este monitorizata activitatea administratorilor cloud?
text.en: How is cloud administrator activity monitored?

recommendation.ro: Activati audit logs + alerting pe actiuni privilegiate
recommendation.en: Enable audit logs + alerting on privileged actions

text.ro: Exista proces de patching pentru VM-uri si servicii cloud?
text.en: Is there patching process for VMs and cloud services?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati Azure Update Management / Automanage

text.ro: Cum se face evaluarea riscurilor pentru resursele cloud?
text.en: How are risks assessed for cloud resources?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati Defender for Cloud + Azure Policy
recommendation.en: Use Defender for Cloud + Azure Policy

text.ro: IT si OT sunt separate prin firewall / VLAN?
text.en: Are IT and OT separated by firewall / VLAN?

recommendation.ro: Implementati DMZ / Purdue Level 3.5 firewall

text.ro: Cine are acces la SCADA / ICS?
text.en: Who has access to SCADA / ICS?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati least privilege + logging acces OT
recommendation.en: Apply least privilege + OT access logging

text.ro: Se monitorizeaza traficul OT?
text.en: Is OT traffic monitored?

recommendation.ro: Implementati OT NDR / IDS dedicat

text.ro: Exista inventar complet al echipamentelor OT?
text.en: Is there complete OT equipment inventory?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati solutie pasiva OT pentru inventar
recommendation.en: Use passive OT solution for inventory

text.ro: Se aplica patch-uri pe sistemele OT?
text.en: Are patches applied to OT systems?

recommendation.ro: Definiti proces de patch testing in mediu OT

text.ro: Exista proceduri de backup pentru OT?
text.en: Are there OT backup procedures?

recommendation.ro: Realizati backup-uri offline / air-gapped OT

text.ro: Accesul la OT este logat si auditat?
text.en: Is OT access logged and audited?

recommendation.ro: Trimiteti log-uri OT catre central logger
recommendation.en: Forward OT logs to central logger

text.ro: Exista plan de continuitate pentru OT?
text.en: Is there OT continuity plan?

recommendation.ro: Includeti OT in planul BCP/DR

text.ro: Sunt testate periodic controalele de securitate OT?
text.en: Are OT security controls periodically tested?

recommendation.ro: Planificati audit / test anual OT

text.ro: Se fac exercitii de incident response pe OT?
text.en: Are OT incident response exercises performed?

recommendation.ro: Organizati tabletop / simulare anuala OT

text.ro: Toate sistemele critice trimit log-uri catre SIEM?
text.en: Do all critical systems send logs to SIEM?

recommendation.ro: Integrati toate sistemele critice in SIEM
recommendation.en: Integrate all critical systems into SIEM

text.ro: Exista alerting pentru evenimente critice?
text.en: Is there alerting for critical events?

recommendation.ro: Definiti use-case-uri + alerting real-time

text.ro: Cine monitorizeaza SIEM-ul?
text.en: Who monitors the SIEM?

recommendation.ro: Stabiliti echipa SOC / serviciu 24/7

text.ro: Log-urile sunt pastrate conform politicii?
text.en: Are logs retained according to policy?

recommendation.ro: Setati retention min 12 luni pentru log-uri critice
recommendation.en: Set min 12 months retention for critical logs

text.ro: Exista raportare periodica a incidentelor?
text.en: Is there periodic incident reporting?

recommendation.ro: Generati raport lunar / trimestrial

text.ro: Sunt colectate log-uri OT?
text.en: Are OT logs collected?

recommendation.ro: Integrati log-uri OT in SIEM central
recommendation.en: Integrate OT logs into central SIEM

text.ro: Exista correlation intre log-uri IT si OT?
text.en: Is there correlation between IT and OT logs?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati correlation rules in SIEM

text.ro: Se fac teste de integritate a log-urilor?
text.en: Are log integrity tests performed?

recommendation.ro: Implementati hashing / WORM storage pentru log-uri
recommendation.en: Implement hashing / WORM storage for logs

text.ro: Sunt definite use cases pentru alerting?
text.en: Are alerting use cases defined?

recommendation.ro: Creati minim 20-30 use-case-uri de detectie

text.ro: Log-urile sunt criptate si protejate impotriva modificarii?
text.en: Are logs encrypted and protected against tampering?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati transport criptat + WORM

text.ro: Exista Incident Response Plan documentat?
text.en: Is there a documented Incident Response Plan?

recommendation.ro: Actualizati planul IR cu flux NIS2 si OT
recommendation.en: Update IR plan with NIS2 and OT flow

text.ro: Echipa stie ce pasi sa urmeze?
text.en: Does the team know what steps to follow?

recommendation.ro: Realizati training anual + playbook clar

text.ro: Au existat simulari / teste?
text.en: Have simulations / tests been performed?

recommendation.ro: Organizati tabletop anual + simulare live

text.ro: Incident reporting este aliniat cu NIS2 (24h/72h)?
text.en: Is incident reporting aligned with NIS2 (24h/72h)?

recommendation.ro: Definiti flux de raportare 24h initial / 72h update

text.ro: Exista roluri si responsabilitati clare?
text.en: Are roles and responsibilities clear?

recommendation.ro: Documentati RACI matrix pentru IR

text.ro: Cum sunt clasificate incidentele (low/medium/high/critical)?
text.en: How are incidents classified (low/medium/high/critical)?

recommendation.ro: Definiti matrice de clasificare incident

text.ro: Exista proceduri pentru comunicarea interna si catre autoritati?
text.en: Are there procedures for internal and authority communication?

recommendation.ro: Creati template-uri de comunicare NIS2

text.ro: Cum se colecteaza dovezile in caz de incident?
text.en: How is evidence collected in case of incident?

recommendation.ro: Definiti chain-of-custody pentru dovezi digitale

text.ro: Se face post-mortem pentru fiecare incident?
text.en: Is post-mortem performed for each incident?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti after-action review dupa fiecare incident major
recommendation.en: Introduce after-action review after each major incident

text.ro: Exista plan de comunicare pentru clienti?
text.en: Is there a client communication plan?

recommendation.ro: Includeti comunicare clienti in planul IR
recommendation.en: Include client communication in IR plan

text.ro: Se fac scanari de vulnerabilitati periodice?
text.en: Are vulnerability scans performed periodically?

recommendation.ro: Planificati scanari saptamanale / lunare

text.ro: Ce tool-uri sunt folosite (Nessus, OpenVAS etc.)?
text.en: What tools are used (Nessus, OpenVAS etc.)?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati tool autenticat + credentialed scanning

text.ro: Cum se prioritizeaza vulnerabilitatile?
text.en: How are vulnerabilities prioritized?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati CVSS + business impact scoring

text.ro: Cum se remediaza vulnerabilitatile critice?
text.en: How are critical vulnerabilities remediated?

recommendation.ro: Definiti SLA 7-14 zile pentru critice

text.ro: Se fac teste de penetrare periodice?
text.en: Are periodic penetration tests performed?

recommendation.ro: Planificati pentest anual + retest

text.ro: Se verifica patching-ul serverelor si aplicatiilor?
text.en: Is server and application patching verified?

recommendation.ro: Implementati raportare conformitate patching

text.ro: Cine este responsabil pentru remediation?
text.en: Who is responsible for remediation?

recommendation.ro: Atribuiti owner per vulnerabilitate

text.ro: Exista raport periodic pentru management?
text.en: Is there periodic report for management?

recommendation.ro: Generati dashboard lunar de vulnerabilitati

text.ro: Exista verificare pentru OT / ICS?
text.en: Is there verification for OT / ICS?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati tool-uri pasive pentru scanare OT
recommendation.en: Use passive tools for OT scanning

text.ro: Cum se documenteaza remedierile?
text.en: How are remediations documented?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati ticketing system cu dovada inainte/dupa
recommendation.en: Use ticketing system with before/after proof

text.ro: Exista clasificare a datelor?
text.en: Is there data classification?

recommendation.ro: Implementati sensitivity labels Microsoft Purview

text.ro: Datele sensibile sunt criptate?
text.en: Are sensitive data encrypted?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati encryption at-rest si in-transit

text.ro: Exista reguli de prevenire exfiltrare (DLP)?
text.en: Are there data exfiltration prevention rules (DLP)?

recommendation.ro: Activati DLP policies in M365 + endpoint
recommendation.en: Enable DLP policies in M365 + endpoint

text.ro: Email-ul intern este filtrat pentru date sensibile?
text.en: Is internal email filtered for sensitive data?

recommendation.ro: Configurati DLP pentru Exchange Online

text.ro: Accesul la date sensibile este monitorizat?
text.en: Is access to sensitive data monitored?

recommendation.ro: Activati audit logs + alerting acces neautorizat
recommendation.en: Enable audit logs + unauthorized access alerting

text.ro: Exista politici de retention si disposal?
text.en: Are there retention and disposal policies?

recommendation.ro: Definiti retention schedule conform GDPR/NIS2

text.ro: Exista instruire pentru manipulare date sensibile?
text.en: Is there training for handling sensitive data?

recommendation.ro: Includeti modul date sensibile in training awareness
recommendation.en: Include sensitive data module in awareness training

text.ro: Se fac teste de DLP?
text.en: Are DLP tests performed?

recommendation.ro: Executati teste periodice de exfiltrare

text.ro: Se revizuiesc regulile DLP periodic?
text.en: Are DLP rules periodically reviewed?

recommendation.ro: Revizuiti reguli DLP trimestrial

text.ro: Datele sunt protejate in cloud si pe endpoint?
text.en: Are data protected in cloud and on endpoint?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati encryption + DLP pe endpoint si cloud
recommendation.en: Apply encryption + DLP on endpoint and cloud

text.ro: Toti furnizorii cu acces IT/OT sunt evaluati?
text.en: Are all vendors with IT/OT access evaluated?

recommendation.ro: Implementati proces de vendor risk assessment

text.ro: Exista contracte cu clauze de securitate?
text.en: Are there contracts with security clauses?

recommendation.ro: Includeti clauze GDPR, NIS2, audit right in contracte
recommendation.en: Include GDPR, NIS2, audit right clauses in contracts

text.ro: Accesul vendorilor este limitat si logat?
text.en: Is vendor access limited and logged?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati JIT access + logging pentru vendor
recommendation.en: Use JIT access + logging for vendors

text.ro: Se fac verificari periodice asupra furnizorilor?
text.en: Are periodic vendor checks performed?

recommendation.ro: Planificati reassessment anual

text.ro: Cum se gestioneaza riscul furnizorilor critici?
text.en: How is risk of critical vendors managed?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati tiering + controale suplimentare

text.ro: Exista proces de onboarding / offboarding furnizori?
text.en: Is there vendor onboarding / offboarding process?

recommendation.ro: Definiti checklist onboarding/offboarding

text.ro: Exista evaluare a subcontractorilor?
text.en: Are subcontractors evaluated?

recommendation.ro: Includeti subcontractori in evaluare furnizori

text.ro: Se monitorizeaza activitatea vendorilor in timp real?
text.en: Is vendor activity monitored in real time?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati CASB / UEBA pentru monitorizare vendor
recommendation.en: Use CASB / UEBA for vendor monitoring

text.ro: Exista audit periodic pentru furnizori?
text.en: Is there periodic vendor audit?

recommendation.ro: Planificati audit anual pentru furnizori critici
recommendation.en: Schedule annual audit for critical vendors

text.ro: Se documenteaza toate riscurile tertilor?
text.en: Are all third-party risks documented?

recommendation.ro: Creati registru de riscuri furnizori

text.ro: Toate sistemele critice au backup?
text.en: Do all critical systems have backup?

recommendation.ro: Asigurati backup 3-2-1 pentru toate sistemele critice
recommendation.en: Ensure 3-2-1 backup for all critical systems

text.ro: Backup-ul este testat periodic?
text.en: Is backup periodically tested?

recommendation.ro: Executati teste de restaurare trimestriale

text.ro: Exista backup offline?
text.en: Is there offline backup?

recommendation.ro: Implementati backup air-gapped / offline

text.ro: Exista plan de recuperare in caz de incident?
text.en: Is there incident recovery plan?

recommendation.ro: Documentati RTO/RPO si proceduri DR

text.ro: RTO / RPO sunt definite si respectate?
text.en: Are RTO / RPO defined and respected?

recommendation.ro: Testati respectarea RTO/RPO in exercitii

text.ro: Backup-urile sunt protejate impotriva accesului neautorizat?
text.en: Are backups protected against unauthorized access?

recommendation.ro: Aplicati encryption + access control pe backup
recommendation.en: Apply encryption + access control on backup

text.ro: Sunt log-urile backup-urilor centralizate?
text.en: Are backup logs centralized?

recommendation.ro: Trimiteti log-uri backup catre SIEM

text.ro: Planul DR include si OT?
text.en: Does the DR plan include OT?

recommendation.ro: Includeti scenarii OT in planul DR
recommendation.en: Include OT scenarios in DR plan

text.ro: S-au facut exercitii simulate pentru DR?
text.en: Have DR simulated exercises been performed?

recommendation.ro: Executati failover test anual

text.ro: Se fac audituri periodice pentru backup si DR?
text.en: Are periodic audits performed for backup and DR?

recommendation.ro: Planificati audit anual backup/DR

text.ro: Exista proces de code review securizat in pipeline?
text.en: Is there a secure code review process in the pipeline?

recommendation.ro: Implementati code review obligatoriu + tool static analysis (SonarQube, Semgrep)
recommendation.en: Implement mandatory code review + static analysis tool (SonarQube, Semgrep)

text.ro: Se fac scanari SAST / DAST in CI/CD?
text.en: Are SAST / DAST scans performed in CI/CD?

recommendation.ro: Integrati SAST (Checkmarx, Sonar) si DAST (OWASP ZAP, Burp) in pipeline
recommendation.en: Integrate SAST (Checkmarx, Sonar) and DAST (OWASP ZAP, Burp) in pipeline

text.ro: Dependentele open-source sunt scanate pentru vulnerabilitati?
text.en: Are open-source dependencies scanned for vulnerabilities?

recommendation.ro: Utilizati Dependabot, Snyk sau OWASP Dependency-Check
recommendation.en: Use Dependabot, Snyk or OWASP Dependency-Check

text.ro: Exista secret scanning in repository?
text.en: Is there secret scanning in repositories?

recommendation.ro: Activati GitHub secret scanning sau TruffleHog
recommendation.en: Enable GitHub secret scanning or TruffleHog

text.ro: Se folosesc container scanning (Docker images)?
text.en: Are container images scanned?

recommendation.ro: Integrati Trivy / Clair / Docker Scout in pipeline
recommendation.en: Integrate Trivy / Clair / Docker Scout in pipeline

text.ro: Exista threat modeling in faza de design?
text.en: Is threat modeling performed during design phase?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti STRIDE / PASTA threat modeling

text.ro: Se aplica secure coding guidelines?
text.en: Are secure coding guidelines applied?

recommendation.ro: Adoptati OWASP Secure Coding Practices

text.ro: Exista proces de security sign-off inainte de deploy?
text.en: Is there security sign-off before deployment?

recommendation.ro: Introduceti gate de securitate in pipeline

text.ro: Se monitorizeaza runtime security (RASP / WAF)?
text.en: Is runtime security monitored (RASP / WAF)?

recommendation.ro: Implementati WAF + RASP (Contrast, Imperva etc)

text.ro: Exista training DevSecOps pentru dezvoltatori?
text.en: Is there DevSecOps training for developers?

recommendation.ro: Organizati sesiuni anuale DevSecOps pentru echipa de dev
recommendation.en: Organize annual DevSecOps sessions for dev team
